nodes.label: Decentralized Identity (DID) Admin Tool
nodes.rationale: DID resolver code (resolveDID/resolveDIDWeb/resolveDIDKey, base58 codec) was already built but had no UI; exposing a /admin/did resolve + proof-of-control challenge tool is the cheapest, highest-impact way to surface a shipped-but-undocumented subsystem.

nodes.label: Cross-Tenant JIT Access
nodes.rationale: requestCrossTenantAccess()/CrossTenantJITStore existed with no UI; a requester page (/dashboard/jit) plus an admin approval inbox (/admin/jit) turns auto-expiring (<=1h) grants into a usable, auditable workflow.

nodes.label: Workload / Agent Identity
nodes.rationale: The 2026 frontier for an auth platform is agentic auth; issuing short-lived, narrowly-scoped client-credential tokens that carry a principal_type:agent + workload_id claim lets AI agents and services be distinguished from human users on top of the existing OIDC + token-exchange foundation.

nodes.label: Identity federation (RFC 8693)
nodes.rationale: exchangeToken()/initFederationFromEnv()/listProviders() existed but were undocumented; a trusted-provider registry UI at /admin/federation surfaces the RFC 8693 token-exchange backend and is the foundation for on-behalf-of / act-as delegation flows.
